html:
Exclusive to:

The Shark Tooth Crown is a craftable Dress item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires a Science Machine to prototype and 5 Hound's Tooth and 1 Gold Nugget to craft. While worn on a Boat, Shark Tooth Crowns restore 6.6 Sanity per minute. It is not flammable and lasts 9 Days. A Sewing Kit repairs 55% of its durability.

Trivia

  • The Shark Tooth Crown was introduced in the Release the Quacken update.

Bugs

  • Sometimes, the Shark Tooth Crown will not restore any sanity while on a Boat. This can be fixed by reloading the world.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Willow wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Wendy wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • WX-78 wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Woodie wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Wes wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Maxwell wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Webber wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Walani wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Warly wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Wilbur wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Wilba wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Wormwood wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • Wheeler wearing a Shark Tooth Crown.
  • A Shark Tooth Crown on the ground.

–Wigfrid

–Webber
“Feels wrong having these on my head...”
–Walani
“Look upon your king!”
–Warly
“Madness ta put th'devil's knives on me head.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A HAT O' BITY-NESS”
–Wilba
“Bitey Head Thing.”
–Wormwood
“The gold tooth is a nice touch.”
–Wheeler
The Shark Tooth Crown is a craftable Dress item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires a Science Machine to prototype and 5 Hound's Tooth and 1 Gold Nugget to craft. While worn on a Boat, Shark Tooth Crowns restore 6.6 Sanity per minute. It is not flammable and lasts 9 Days. A Sewing Kit repairs 55% of its durability.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Shark Tooth Crown was introduced in the Release the Quacken update.
Bugs[edit | edit source]
Sometimes, the Shark Tooth Crown will not restore any sanity while on a Boat. This can be fixed by reloading the world.

The '''Shark Tooth Crown''' is a craftable [[Dress]] item introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype and 5 [[Hound's Tooth]] and 1 [[Gold Nugget]] to craft. While worn on a [[Boats|Boat]], Shark Tooth Crowns restore 6.6 [[Sanity]] per minute. It is not flammable and lasts 9 [[Day-Night Cycle|Days.]] A [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 55% of its durability.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Shark Tooth Crown was introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#February 25th, 2016 - Release the Quacken Update|Release the Quacken]]'' update.

=={{Pic32|Mosquito}} Bugs ==
* Sometimes, the Shark Tooth Crown will not restore any sanity while on a Boat. This can be fixed by reloading the world.
